'''C-Foroon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==History==
C-Foroon was remade into the throneworld of the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] in the last century of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]].<ref name="Atlas" /> Subsequently, this planet was the center of a thriving [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] business during the years surrounding the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].<ref name="JQ6" /> At one point, the planet was also owned by [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt]] (and harbored for a time her daughter [[Decca Besadii Diori|Decca's]] center of operations<ref name="JQ6" />), but was taken eventually by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. The [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] takeover ruined Besadii fortunes in the Arkanis sector.<ref name="Atlas" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Shadow Trap]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker]]'' {{Ab|A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
